prompt:
Build src/markdown_exporter.py for the Rosetta project.

Responsibilities:
- export_to_markdown(session_data: dict) -> str
  Assembles full onboarding document from session state
  Sections: database overview, table glossary, sample queries, schema summary
- format_table_section(table: dict) -> str
  Formats one table entry with name, description, columns
- format_query_section(query: dict) -> str
  Formats one query with title, annotation, SQL code block

Pure Python only. No external dependencies.
Input is the full st.session_state dict.
Output is a single Markdown string ready for st.download_button.
